turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bodyGrad" x1="170" y1="190" x2="430" y2="320" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#6dd6ff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1e87ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bellyGrad" x1="170" y1="270" x2="420" y2="310" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8f7ff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#bfe8ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- water background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#e8f6ff"/>
  <path d="M0 380 C80 340, 160 420, 240 390 C320 360, 400 420, 512 380 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#bfe7ff" opacity="0.9"/>
  <path d="M0 330 C90 300, 160 360, 250 330 C330 305, 410 350, 512 320" fill="none" stroke="#7ecbff" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.35"/>
  <path d="M0 260 C70 240, 150 290, 240 265 C330 240, 420 285, 512 255" fill="none" stroke="#7ecbff" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- shark shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="285" cy="360" rx="130" ry="34" fill="#0b3a5a" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- tail -->
  <path d="M120 255 C70 235, 40 250, 20 280 C55 290, 55 320, 25 340 C55 350, 88 335, 120 315 C105 292, 105 276, 120 255 Z" fill="#1b7bdc"/>
  <path d="M106 262 C72 252, 52 262, 40 280 C64 286, 64 306, 44 320 C62 326, 86 312, 106 300 Z" fill="#6dd6ff" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- tail fin notch -->
  <path d="M92 290 C62 300, 50 312, 42 328 C62 328, 78 330, 98 318 Z" fill="#0e5fb2" opacity="0.65"/>

  <!-- body (main) -->
  <path d="M145 255 C190 205, 275 185, 352 215 C420 242, 445 290, 420 330 C388 380, 300 405, 225 385 C170 370, 135 330, 145 255 Z" fill="url(#bodyGrad)"/>

  <!-- belly -->
  <path d="M185 285 C210 250, 270 235, 325 255 C360 268, 382 298, 372 327 C358 365, 298 385, 245 370 C205 360, 176 335, 185 285 Z" fill="url(#bellyGrad)" opacity="0.95"/>

  <!-- dorsal fin -->
  <path d="M255 230 C278 205, 315 210, 320 245 C300 260, 275 265, 255 260 Z" fill="#156cc9"/>
  <path d="M266 236 C283 220, 303 223, 308 243 C295 253, 279 255, 266 250 Z" fill="#6dd6ff" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- pectoral fin -->
  <path d="M315 300 C335 285, 365 295, 370 315 C355 330, 335 332, 318 322 Z" fill="#156cc9"/>
  <path d="M322 306 C336 296, 352 304, 355 314 C345 322, 334 324, 324 318 Z" fill="#6dd6ff" opacity="0.45"/>

  <!-- head / snout emphasis -->
  <path d="M342 226 C372 240, 405 275, 404 305 C390 312, 372 316, 360 312 C372 294, 366 260, 342 226 Z" fill="#0f6be0" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- eye -->
  <circle cx="352" cy="262" r="8" fill="#08334f"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="260" r="3" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- mouth line -->
  <path d="M330 282 C345 290, 360 292, 378 290" fill="none" stroke="#08334f" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>

  <!-- gill slashes -->
  <path d="M305 275 C318 278, 328 283, 336 290" fill="none" stroke="#0b4a73" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/>
  <path d="M300 290 C314 292, 325 298, 333 305" fill="none" stroke="#0b4a73" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.28"/>

  <!-- whisker-like highlights (subtle) -->
  <path d="M185 295 C210 280, 240 275, 265 278" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.35" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
